# Pull Request Template

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

**Type of change:**
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue number)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them.

- [ ] Test A: [description]
- [ ] Test B: [description]

**Hardware tested on:**
- OS: [e.g., Linux Mint]
- CPU: [e.g., Intel i5-4300U]
- RAM: [e.g., 8GB]

## Performance Impact

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Improves performance: [describe improvement and measurements]
- [ ] Potential performance degradation: [describe and justify]

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the Rust style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings (`cargo clippy`)
- [ ] My code passes `cargo test`
- [ ] I have formatted my code (`cargo fmt`)
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

## Additional context

Add any other context about the PR here.
